name: Kourabiedes (Wedding Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and sugar in a large bowl. Beat in egg yolk until mixture is smooth and light.
2. Beat in brandy or juice. Sift together flour and baking powder.
3. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture, a little at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in almonds.
5. Turn out onto a floured surface. Knead with floured hands until dough is no longer sticky.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Pinch off 1-inch pieces and shape into balls or crescents. If desired, insert one whole clove in the center of each cookie, or press one or two dimples into each.
8. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until cookies are pale golden.
10. Cool on baking sheets.
11. Sprinkle heavily with powdered sugar while still warm.
12. Cookies are extremely fragile. Remove from baking sheets with a spatula.
13. Store in an airtight container between sheets of waxed paper.
14. Makes about 30.
